prompt:
Convert this legacy script to SA Pro C#. It adds results to a scorecard then exports images from each planogram.

_PS_For projects
  _PS_Open project file {FileName=CurrentProject}
  _PS_For planograms
    _PS_Add planogram to scorecard
    _PS_Export image {LayoutFile="[CurrentView]"} {ImageType="JPEG (*.jpg)"} {File="C:\Output\image.jpg"}
  _PS_End planograms
  _PS_Close project file
_PS_End projects

assertions.name: flags-unsupported-scorecard-command
assertions.description: Explicitly flags 'Add planogram to scorecard' as having no SA Pro equivalent

assertions.name: includes-unsupported-comment-in-code
assertions.description: Leaves a comment in the converted code where the unsupported command was

assertions.name: still-converts-export-image
assertions.description: Converts the ExportImage call correctly despite the unsupported command

assertions.name: uses-forprojects-forplanograms
assertions.description: Uses SpacePlanning.ForProjects() and ForPlanograms() loop structure
